problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing
hypothesis: Combining Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 15 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
